title: Ark's Stream Modpack
description: This is the modpack Ark uses on stream! I'll randomly update this as I add and remove mods :)
body:
This modpack is the modpack that I use while streaming on [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/ark_mc) and in general! This pack includes various types of mods from Utility, to Quality-of-Life, to Optimization! 

This pack will randomly get updated as I add/remove mods-- for any questions you can join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/4drx4jQrgP) server and I can help you out (feedback can be given there as-well)!
